audit_items.proof_trace: checkPeerCustody is a synchronous function with no yield points. In Nim's cooperative async model, synchronous functions execute atomically without preemption. All five lookupCgcFromPeer calls (L319, L327, L330, L338, L342) within checkPeerCustody observe the same peer.metadata value because updatePeerMetadata cannot interleave execution mid-function.
